prerequisites: A Close.com account with access to Settings > Developer > API Keys.
A Close API key created in the Close app (the full key is shown only once at creation, so copy and store it securely).
Optionally, the earliest date to begin syncing records, for the optional start_date config field.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single Close API key supplied in the required api_key field. API keys can read and modify all of your CRM data, so handle them carefully. Create one under Settings > Developer > API Keys; the full key is displayed only once at creation.

setupSteps.title: Create a Close API key
setupSteps.body: In the Close app, go to Settings > Developer > API Keys and click + New API Key. Give the key an informative name so you can tell which integration it belongs to. Copy the full key immediately, because Close will not display it again (only the key's ID remains visible).

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the full Close API key into the required api_key field. This is the connector's only secret and is what authenticates all requests to the Close API.

setupSteps.title: Set an optional start date
setupSteps.body: Optionally fill the start_date field to limit the sync to records from that date onward. This field is not required; leave it empty to use the connector's default behavior.

sources.title: Close help: API Keys (Settings > Developer > API Keys)
